job_descriptions.title: Machine Learning Engineer - Product
job_descriptions.summary: Build and deploy scalable machine learning models powering personalization, ranking, and recommendation systems in production environments.
responsibilities: design and train machine learning models for user-facing applications
build end-to-end pipelines from data ingestion to inference
deploy models as scalable APIs
monitor performance and handle data drift
run a b experiments to evaluate model impact

job_descriptions.title: Machine Learning Engineer - NLP / LLM
job_descriptions.summary: Develop large-scale natural language processing systems including transformers, chatbots, and retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.
responsibilities: fine tune transformer models for domain-specific tasks
build scalable nlp pipelines and embedding systems
optimize inference latency for large language models
implement retrieval augmented generation systems
evaluate models using automated and human metrics

job_descriptions.title: Machine Learning Engineer - MLOps / Platform
job_descriptions.summary: Design and maintain scalable machine learning infrastructure, enabling reproducible training, deployment, and monitoring pipelines.
responsibilities: build ci cd pipelines for machine learning workflows
automate model training validation and deployment
implement monitoring and alerting systems
manage distributed training pipelines
ensure reproducibility and version control

job_descriptions.title: Machine Learning Engineer - Computer Vision
job_descriptions.summary: Develop and deploy deep learning models for image and video understanding tasks such as detection, segmentation, and tracking.
responsibilities: train deep learning models for vision tasks
process large-scale image and video datasets
optimize models for real-time inference
deploy models to cloud or edge environments
improve robustness and generalization

job_descriptions.title: Data Scientist - Product Analytics
job_descriptions.summary: Drive product decisions through data by building models, running experiments, and delivering actionable insights to improve user engagement and retention.
responsibilities: analyze user behavior and product metrics to identify trends
design and evaluate a b experiments
build predictive models for churn and engagement
communicate insights to stakeholders using visualizations
collaborate with product and engineering teams

job_descriptions.title: Data Scientist - Machine Learning
job_descriptions.summary: Develop and deploy machine learning models to solve business problems such as forecasting, classification, and recommendation.
responsibilities: build and validate machine learning models
perform feature engineering and data preprocessing
optimize model performance using tuning techniques
collaborate with engineers to deploy models
monitor model performance over time

job_descriptions.title: Data Scientist - Experimentation & Causal Inference
job_descriptions.summary: Focus on designing experiments and applying causal inference techniques to measure the true impact of product and business changes.
responsibilities: design randomized controlled experiments
analyze experiment results with statistical rigor
apply causal inference methods to observational data
define success metrics and guardrails
communicate findings to business stakeholders

job_descriptions.title: Data Scientist - Business Intelligence & Analytics
job_descriptions.summary: Translate business problems into data-driven solutions by building dashboards, performing deep analysis, and delivering insights.
responsibilities: build dashboards and reports for stakeholders
analyze large datasets to uncover business insights
define and track key performance indicators
work with data engineers to ensure data quality
present findings in a clear and actionable manner

job_descriptions.title: Backend Developer - API & Services
job_descriptions.summary: Design and build robust backend services and APIs that power web and mobile applications with high reliability and scalability.
responsibilities: design and implement scalable rest apis
develop server side logic and business workflows
integrate with databases and third party services
ensure performance reliability and security of backend systems
write clean maintainable and testable code

job_descriptions.title: Backend Developer - Microservices
job_descriptions.summary: Build and maintain microservices-based backend systems with a focus on scalability, resilience, and service-to-service communication.
responsibilities: design and develop microservices
implement inter-service communication using messaging systems
handle service discovery and load balancing
ensure fault tolerance and resilience
optimize system performance at scale

job_descriptions.title: Backend Developer - Data & Infrastructure
job_descriptions.summary: Develop backend systems focused on high-throughput data processing, storage, and retrieval for large-scale applications.
responsibilities: build data ingestion and processing pipelines
optimize database queries and storage systems
work with large-scale distributed data systems
ensure data consistency and reliability
collaborate with data engineers and platform teams

job_descriptions.title: Backend Developer - Platform / Reliability
job_descriptions.summary: Focus on building highly reliable backend systems with strong observability, monitoring, and fault-tolerant architecture.
responsibilities: implement logging monitoring and alerting systems
design systems for high availability and fault tolerance
optimize backend services for latency and throughput
handle incident response and debugging
improve system reliability and uptime

job_descriptions.title: Frontend Developer - React
job_descriptions.summary: Build modern, responsive web applications using React with a focus on performance, scalability, and user experience.
responsibilities: develop reusable ui components
manage application state efficiently
integrate frontend with backend apis
optimize performance using code splitting and lazy loading
ensure cross browser compatibility

job_descriptions.title: Frontend Developer - Fullstack Interface
job_descriptions.summary: Develop end-to-end user interfaces with strong integration to backend systems, focusing on seamless user experiences.
responsibilities: build dynamic user interfaces
consume and manage backend apis
handle authentication flows in frontend
collaborate with backend engineers
maintain code quality and consistency

job_descriptions.title: Frontend Developer - Performance & Optimization
job_descriptions.summary: Focus on optimizing frontend applications for speed, scalability, and excellent user experience across devices.
responsibilities: analyze and improve web performance metrics
implement lazy loading and code splitting
optimize rendering and reduce bundle size
ensure accessibility compliance
monitor frontend performance

job_descriptions.title: Frontend Developer - Design Systems
job_descriptions.summary: Develop and maintain scalable design systems and reusable component libraries used across multiple applications.
responsibilities: build reusable and accessible components
maintain consistency across ui elements
collaborate with designers using figma
document components and usage guidelines
ensure accessibility standards compliance

job_descriptions.title: Cloud Engineer - AWS Infrastructure
job_descriptions.summary: Design, deploy, and manage scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS with a focus on reliability, performance, and cost efficiency.
responsibilities: provision and manage cloud infrastructure using infrastructure as code
configure networking components such as vpc subnets and load balancers
implement auto scaling and high availability architectures
monitor system performance and optimize costs
ensure security best practices across cloud resources

job_descriptions.title: Cloud Engineer - DevOps / CI CD
job_descriptions.summary: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure to enable rapid and reliable software delivery.
responsibilities: design and implement ci cd pipelines
automate build test and deployment workflows
manage containerized applications
ensure reliability and scalability of deployment systems
collaborate with development teams for release processes

job_descriptions.title: Cloud Engineer - Platform & Reliability
job_descriptions.summary: Develop and maintain highly reliable cloud platforms with strong focus on observability, fault tolerance, and uptime.
responsibilities: design highly available cloud systems
implement monitoring logging and alerting systems
handle incident response and root cause analysis
optimize system performance and reliability
ensure compliance with sla and slos

job_descriptions.title: Cloud Engineer - Security
job_descriptions.summary: Focus on securing cloud infrastructure by implementing robust security controls, identity management, and compliance measures.
responsibilities: implement iam roles and access control policies
secure network configurations and endpoints
monitor and respond to security incidents
ensure compliance with security standards
conduct vulnerability assessments

job_descriptions.title: Full Stack Developer - Web Applications
job_descriptions.summary: Develop end-to-end web applications including frontend interfaces, backend services, and database systems.
responsibilities: build responsive user interfaces and backend services
design and implement rest apis
integrate frontend with backend systems
manage databases and data models
ensure performance scalability and security
required_skills: node.js or django or spring boot

job_descriptions.title: Full Stack Developer - MERN Stack
job_descriptions.summary: Build scalable web applications using the MERN stack with focus on performance and maintainability.
responsibilities: develop frontend using react
build backend services using node.js and express
manage mongodb databases
implement authentication and authorization
optimize application performance

job_descriptions.title: Full Stack Developer - Enterprise Applications
job_descriptions.summary: Develop large-scale enterprise applications with strong emphasis on architecture, scalability, and maintainability.
responsibilities: design scalable full stack systems
develop backend services and frontend interfaces
ensure secure authentication and authorization
integrate with third party systems
maintain code quality and documentation

job_descriptions.title: Full Stack Developer - Startup / Generalist
job_descriptions.summary: Work across the entire stack to rapidly build and iterate on product features in a fast-paced startup environment.
responsibilities: own features from idea to deployment
build frontend and backend components
deploy and monitor applications
debug issues across the stack
collaborate closely with product teams
